tagline: Import reports from Power BI and Tableau: Authors can now import Power BI and Tableau reports as a new AI/BI dashboard directly from the dashboard list page.
what_it_does: Import reports from Power BI and Tableau: Authors can now import Power BI and Tableau reports as a new AI/BI dashboard directly from the dashboard list page. Improved metric view reuse when importing: When importing Tableau and Power BI reports as AI/BI dashboards, Genie Code is now more likely to reference existing Unity Catalog metric views instead of creating new ones. Hide dashboard pages before publishing: Authors can now hide dashboard pages so they aren't published, while continuing to edit them in draft mode.
why_it_matters: Improved metric view reuse when importing: When importing Tableau and Power BI reports as AI/BI dashboards, Genie Code is now more likely to reference existing Unity Catalog metric views instead of creating new ones.
